caption: The video features a man speaking at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. He is dressed formally in a suit and tie, indicating a professional setting. The man appears to be engaged in delivering a presentation or interview, as suggested by his hand gestures and focused expression. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, and the hashtag #MDW22 is displayed on the screen, along with the logo of "theCUBE," which suggests that this segment might be part of a live broadcast or recorded coverage of the conference. The background shows a modern interior with large windows, adding to the professional ambiance of the setting.
